_convention: ALL residue numbering in this project uses the MODEL/design index (the AcrR_dimer.fasta / PDB index we design on, 1..182). The wet-lab construct labels (e.g. F128W, L156R) are recorded once as 'wetlab_alias' for traceability only; they are model index + 9. Do NOT use experimental numbering anywhere in code/figures/results.

wt.phenotype: Responds to progesterone & testosterone (1-100 uM, max ~150000 a.u.); ~no cortisol response in tested range; estradiol non-responder. Tight DNA binder (apo ~34 A), no basal leak.

f119w.phenotype: Sensitivity amplifier: Test/Prog dynamic range shifts left ~3 orders (0.01-0.1 uM); GAINS significant cortisol response (0.1-2 uM). Apo ~34 A, no basal leak.

l147r.phenotype: Specificity switch: inverts to cortisol (sensitive from 0.5 uM), retains moderate progesterone, ~loses testosterone (antagonist); max amplitude attenuated (~25000 a.u.); apo pre-opened (~36.5 A) -> ~10% basal leak, hyper-sensitive 1-5 uM.

r123e.phenotype: DESIGN positive-control graft (estrogen carboxylate clamp): aims to bind estradiol's 3-OH phenol and repel the 4-en-3-one keto decoys.

r123d.phenotype: DESIGN positive-control graft (Asp variant of the carboxylate clamp).
